context: Tests whether the SensorKit skill corrects stale or easy-to-misremember sample types and delegate callback coverage.

checklist.name: Accelerometer array
checklist.description: Corrects accelerometer results to arrays of CMRecordedAccelerometerData, not live CMAccelerometerData.

checklist.name: Rotation array
checklist.description: Corrects rotation-rate results to arrays of CMRecordedRotationRateData, not CMGyroData.

checklist.name: Wrist session
checklist.description: Corrects wrist temperature to SRWristTemperatureSession as the fetched sample object.

checklist.name: Wrist readings
checklist.description: Explains that SRWristTemperature readings are contained inside the wrist-temperature session.

checklist.name: ECG array
checklist.description: Corrects ECG results to arrays of SRElectrocardiogramSample.

checklist.name: PPG array
checklist.description: Corrects PPG results to arrays of SRPhotoplethysmogramSample.

checklist.name: Device callbacks
checklist.description: Includes both successful device discovery and fetchDevicesDidFailWithError handling.

checklist.name: Fetch callbacks
checklist.description: Includes didFetchResult, didCompleteFetch, and fetching failedWithError callbacks.

checklist.name: Recording failure
checklist.description: Includes stopRecordingFailedWithError as part of the recording callback checklist.
